subcodes.title: Interview with a prominent Rabbi, New York, ca. Apr. 1912
subcodes.first_line: You are most welcome Rabbi. [Rabbi:] "I have long desired to meet you."
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @unity in diversity, @literal interpretation, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @idolatry, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @human reality created in the image of God, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @Christ; Christianity
